description: You are an MEP BIM Coordinator. The architectural model of the FZK-Haus is loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Add basic building services to this model by creating at least three HVAC duct segments (IfcDuctSegment) and three plumbing pipe segments (IfcPipeSegment). Group the duct segments into a new distribution system (IfcDistributionSystem) named 'HVAC Supply Air' and the pipe segments into a new distribution system (IfcDistributionSystem) named 'Domestic Cold Water'. Ensure all elements are properly assigned to their respective systems without deleting existing architectural elements. Save the updated IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_services.ifc.
